title: Monday Doc tracking changes

posts.author: alcestisidead (Dan Scapusio)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello! Right now, Monday docs offer the ability to look at versions of the doc to see changes, which is helpful, but isn’t helpful enough for the kind of editing we’re conducting with my team. We produce copy that is edited by a number of folks. We’d like to request that Monday Docs fold in the kind of functionality that Word Docs have in terms of tracking changes, where one is able to see the edits made by folks and which can be seen and accepted after the fact by editors. Thanks.
